title: Chapter 4
content:
Chapter 4: Date Night.

Liam returned home but he spoke to Darren about enrolling into a gym, Darren had that physique that would make anyone envious.

He recommended a gym he used to go to as he no longer had the time to do so which was a plus.

Liam checked his phone expecting Darren to check-in to make sure he arrived home safely but there was nothing.

But he saw a notification from Sara’s socials, he knew he shouldn’t check it but part of him wondered if it was his video she posted.

She never posted such things and focused solely on her aesthetics in terms of her social media presence; however, it should be in her close friends’ stories.

She posted the video there, Liam checked it and just shook his head not because she had posted it but because he was embarrassed he put himself in that state.

"That bitch ruined my life," Liam muttered under his breath, squeezing his phone.

He had close to approximately $750,000 saved after tax, he was well on his way at 25 years old.

Liam closed her story and wondered why she hadn’t taken him off or even blocked him.

"No time for sulking!" Liam slapped himself and the first thing he knew he needed to fix was his haircut.

He looked like crap and actually needed to groom himself to look better than he currently did.

Liam walked out the door of his apartment, the neighborhood didn’t have the lower class or rarely middle class.

This was an expensive place to be and it was one of the perks that came with the company which meant he would have to leave this apartment as soon as he was sacked already.

However, he had a month’s notice which was a generous amount of time but this was because the person in charge of the firm liked Liam even though she had to let him go.

Liam sighed, he knew he would have to initiate the whole moving process but he didn’t have nearly enough money to start over from scratch however, he wouldn’t have to.

This rebate system granted him a chance at life he didn’t know was possible.

Liam took a deep breath before bringing out his phone to shoot Rachel a message.

[[Liam: Hey beautiful... I just got home and saw something I thought would look good on you...]] Liam shot her a text, keeping it flirty but retaining that curiosity.

And of course, he got a text back right away like she was waiting for the text.

[[Liam: You were thinking of me?]]

Rachel fired back and this made Liam smirk because it showed she was on that kind of timing.

[[Liam: It was hard not to...]]

Liam responded but found himself curious about what she would say.

She took some time to reply despite Liam seeing she had seen his message but he didn’t think much of it. He was about to put down his phone before he got a message and another.

He opened it up to see it was an image attachment.

"Don’t tell me..." Liam was shocked, surely she couldn’t be sending nudes so fast.

Liam opened the pictures and the wide smile on his faded right away.

The picture she sent was of her face with the camera focused on her face, tilting slightly towards her cleavage with the caption: Don’t be so eager😼

Liam’s disappointment turned into a chuckle.

"She is good..." Liam muttered under his breath but there was no doubt he was going to have a lot of fun with her.

And then the message came in from Darren, Liam expected it a few minutes earlier but it was still within the time frame.

[[Darren: Hey buddy, you got home safe or Sara’s little boyfriend beat your ass up again?]]

Liam had no idea when he laughed out loud but it escaped his lips

[[Liam: You are an asshole! You know that right? I just got home a few minutes ago.]]

Liam responded and this was the end of their conversation and then he sent Rachel a picture of a revealing dress, it showed her entire cleavage and the dress barely reached her knees.

[[Rachel: That looks beautiful! I don’t think it would look good on this body of mine... I’m kind of fat😓]]

[[Liam: You say it like it is bad... I like my women with a lot of flesh so how about we go out tonight so I see how it looks on you?]]

Liam asked right away, he had no plans to keep texting each other like they were teenagers and of course, Rachel accepted.

[[Rachel: I would love that!]]
